untranslatable_reason: Signal requires user-specified threshold parameters for short_period_days, long_period_days, and confirmation_bars. Used sma_20/sma_50 as reasonable default proxies (20-day short, 50-day long SMA), but exact parameters are not provided in source material.
translation_notes: Classic SMA crossover strategy (Golden Cross / Death Cross pattern). Entry conditions include price confirmation above/below both moving averages. Exit triggered by SMA crossover reversal. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT: entry_long for bullish crosses, entry_short for bearish crosses. Target regimes set to TRENDING modes as this is a trend-following strategy.
